phase_summary: Real yields at 2.17% are the lone headwind while DXY drifts under 100 — net score +3, accumulation intact into a triple central-bank week led by Wednesday's FOMC dot-plot.
_score_note: score (0-100) sets the pointer position on the gradient bar. Matches macropulse.uk dialStates pointer values: Risk Off~8, Hold~33, BTC Accumulation~58, ALT Rotation~82, Take Profit~95.
_note: active_zone must match one of _zones exactly. The email renders a gradient bar (Sell→Hold→Buy BTC→Alt Season→Top) matching the website design.
